CVE-2024-42934.title: OpenIPMI before 2.0.36 has an out-of-bounds array access (for aut ...
CVE-2024-42934.description: OpenIPMI before 2.0.36 has an out-of-bounds array access (for authentication type) in the ipmi_sim simulator, resulting in denial of service or (with very low probability) authentication bypass or code execution.
